fb-logo: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--fb-blue); color: #fff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: Georgia, serif;
fb-name: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--fb-blue); flex: 1; letter-spacing: -0.5px;
top-btn: width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--divider); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text);
feed-scroll: flex: 1; overflow: hidden; padding: 8px 8px 0; background: var(--canvas);
post-stamp: font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
post-img: aspect-ratio: 16/10; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5A623 0%, #D0021B 50%, #5B3C6F 100%); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
reaction-summary: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);
action-btn: flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; position: relative;
